title: Social Auto-Reply get started recommendation
summary: Does surfacing Social Auto-Reply in playbooks drive Auto-Reply activation?
hypothesis: We believe that surfacing a Social Auto-Reply recommendation for new sign-ups will drive Activation because users will be provided with another path to collecting profiles for lists and segments. We will measure success using 7-day Activation.
results: Activation 7D: +3.9% ±7.2% relative to control (not statistically significant — experiment still running)
control_description: New sign-ups do not see a Social Auto-Reply recommendation in Get Started
treatment_description: New sign-ups see a Social Auto-Reply recommendation in Get Started (50/50 split on new accounts created after 5/26)
